summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Interview Practice Platform MVP including backend APIs, landing page, authentication flow, and dashboard functionality

flaky_endpoints.issue: Login success but session persistence issue in frontend
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 401 errors in console during login, token doesn't persist across page navigation
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Direct JWT token setting works, suggests frontend auth context issue

ui_bugs.issue: Session/JWT token not persisting across page navigation

integration_issues.issue: Form submits successfully but redirect timing/session persistence needs fixing

design_issues.issue: Dark/light mode toggle not clearly visible or implemented

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (main flows working, session persistence issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication session persistence - JWT token should persist across page navigation and reloads. Check AuthContext implementation and localStorage/cookie handling. The login form appears to work but session doesn't persist properly.
